_comment: Build presets for the UI. `stats` are attribute levels; `loadout` is an optional default weapon/affinity/upgrade to select with the preset.

presets.name: Vera Aletheia
presets.description: Dan's samurai — Dex/Arcane bleed, two-handed Rivers of Blood.

presets.name: Quality
presets.description: Balanced Strength/Dexterity — flexible across most weapons.

presets.name: Dex Faith
presets.description: Dexterity + Faith — sacred/lightning infusions and incantation support.

presets.name: Arcane Bleed
presets.description: Dexterity + Arcane — occult/blood infusions, maximum hemorrhage.

presets.name: Moonveil Assassin
presets.description: Meta INT/DEX — Moonveil's Transient Moonlight carries the mid-game and never falls off.

presets.name: Blasphemous Faith
presets.description: STR/FAI — Blasphemous Blade heals on kill; Taker's Flames melts bosses.

presets.name: Colossal Crusher
presets.description: Pure STR — two-handed Heavy Giant-Crusher, the classic poise-breaker.

presets.name: Scarlet Bloom
presets.description: Hyper-DEX — Hand of Malenia, Waterfowl fantasy with innate bleed.

presets.name: Blood Lord
presets.description: ARC spear — Mohgwyn's Sacred Spear, bleed pools plus Bloodboon Ritual.

presets.name: Dark Moon Mage
presets.description: Pure INT — Dark Moon Greatsword with frost; Ranni's ending, Ranni's sword.
